name: Cicilline Press Office
tweet: These issues are too important for political gamesmanship. We need serious leaders who will put our country ahead of politics.

name: Cicilline Press Office
tweet: If someone is standing in the way of progress, hold them accountable.

name: Cicilline Press Office
tweet: Voters should absolutely hold us accountable for what we're doing, or not doing, to address gun violence.

name: Cicilline Press Office
tweet: And the failure to do so makes Congress complicit in the deaths of hundreds of thousands of Americans. I mean, let's be honest here.

name: Cicilline Press Office
tweet: Congress is the only institution with the power to actually do something about this violence.

name: Cicilline Press Office
tweet: They are weapons of war. They have no place in our communities. And it shouldn't be easier to buy an AR-15 than it is to buy cold medicine.

name: Cicilline Press Office
tweet: Their only purpose is to kill as many people as possible, as quickly as possible.

name: Cicilline Press Office
tweet: I believe in the Second Amendment and the right to defend yourself and your family. But assault weapons serve no legitimate purpose.

name: Cicilline Press Office
tweet: It is infuriating that leaders in Congress have still done nothing to address how easy it is for a lone wolf terrorist to buy a gun.

name: Cicilline Press Office
tweet: This is also a reminder that homegrown attacks a threat to our safety. We've seen that at Ft Hood, in Charleston, and now in Orlando.

name: Cicilline Press Office
tweet: Demonizing LGBT Americans only exacerbates hatred and intolerance. LGBT people aren't political wedge issues. We are human beings.

name: Cicilline Press Office
tweet: LGBT Americans are still targets. Last week, politicians in Washington mocked transgender individuals at a "faith and freedom" conference.

name: Cicilline Press Office
tweet: There is too much hatred in this country. You can't look at the TV today and conclude that we have full LGBT equality. We don't.

name: Cicilline Press Office
tweet: But mostly about what could possess someone to do something like this. I don't understand it and I don't think I ever will.

name: Cicilline Press Office
tweet: I've spent much of today thinking about Orlando. About the victims, their families, and their loved ones.
